subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention and utterance and exalted above all comprehension, be unto the most holy and most glorious court of the Object of all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان و منزه از عرفان ساحت امنع اقدس ارفع مقصود عالمیان را
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat]
